segments.text: Hear this word that the LORD has spoken against you, O children of Israel, against the whole family that I brought up out of the land of Egypt:
Only you have I known from all the families of the earth; therefore I will punish youfor all your iniquities.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Can two walk togetherwithout agreeing where to go?
Does a lion roar in the forestwhen he has no prey? Does a young lion growl in his denif he has caught nothing?
Does a bird land in a snarewhere no bait has been set? Does a trap spring from the groundwhen it has nothing to catch?
If a ram’s horn sounds in a city, do the people not tremble? If calamity comes to a city, has not the LORD caused it?

Surely the Lord GOD does nothingwithout revealing His plan
to His servants the prophets.
The lion has roared—who will not fear? The Lord GOD has spoken—who will not prophesy?
Proclaim to the citadels of Ashdod and to the citadels of Egypt:

Assemble on the mountains of Samaria; see the great unrest in the city
and the acts of oppression in her midst.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: For they know not how to do right,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: declares the LORD.
They store up violence and destructionin their citadels.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Therefore this is what the Lord GOD says:

An enemy will surround the land; he will pull down your strongholds
and plunder your citadels.
segments.speaker: the Lord God

segments.text: This is what the LORD says:

As the shepherd snatches from the mouth of the liontwo legs or a piece of an ear, so the Israelites dwelling in Samaria will be rescuedhaving just the corner of a bed
or the cushion of a couch.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Hear and testify against the house of Jacob, declares the Lord GOD, the God of Hosts.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: On the day I punish Israel for their transgressions, I will visit destruction on the altars of Bethel; the horns of the altar will be cut off, and they will fall to the ground.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: I will tear down the winter housealong with the summer house; the houses of ivory will also perish, and the great houses will come to an end,
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: declares the LORD.
